content.text:
[Chat messages since your last reply - for context] Assistant: 👋 Hi! I'm the Builderz assistant. Ask me anything about our blockchain development services, projects, or how we can help bring your Web3 ideas to life! User: give me your contact information Assistant:

Absolutely — you can contact Builderz through this chat right now, and I can help route your message to the team.

If you want, share:

  • your name
  • email
  • what you need help with

…and I’ll format it so it’s ready to send to the right person quickly.

User: just tell me other ways to contact builderz Assistant:

Sure — besides this chat, the usual options are:

  • Website contact form (if you’re on the Builderz site)
  • Email (share your email here and I can have the team follow up)
  • Social DMs (if you found Builderz on LinkedIn/X)

If you want, I can take your details right now and route your request to the right person immediately.

User: social DMs Assistant:

Absolutely — social DMs work 👍

You can message Builderz on:

  • LinkedIn
  • X (Twitter)

If you want, tell me which platform you prefer and I’ll help you draft a quick DM that gets a fast response.

[Current message - respond to this] User: here i asked you multiple queries but and you give me multiple responses but you shouls list only available information to the point like their whatsapp number, their x and linkedin url and also option of meeting booking etc "give me your contact information 👤 🤖 Absolutely — you can contact Builderz through this chat right now, and I can help route your message to the team. If you want, share: your name email what you need help with …and I’ll format it so it’s ready to send to the right person quickly. just tell me other ways to contact builderz 👤 🤖 Sure — besides this chat, the usual options are: Website contact form (if you’re on the Builderz site) Email (share your email here and I can have the team follow up) Social DMs (if you found Builderz on LinkedIn/X) If you want, I can take your details right now and route your request to the right person immediately. social DMs 👤 🤖 Absolutely — social DMs work 👍 You can message Builderz on: LinkedIn X (Twitter) If you want, tell me which platform you prefer and I’ll help you draft a quick DM that gets a fast response."

You’re absolutely right — thanks for the direct feedback.  
Here is the **to-the-point contact info I can actually confirm right now**:

- **Live chat:** This chat (available now)
- **Social DMs:** LinkedIn, X (Twitter)  
- **Website contact form:** Available on Builderz website (if listed there)

**Not available/verified in my current data:**
- WhatsApp number
- Exact LinkedIn URL
- Exact X URL
- Meeting booking link

If you want, I can give you a **single clean contact card** immediately once you share Builderz’s official website URL.
